Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Angling legend Jimmy Houston takes us on his most successful trips with big fish and hilarious antics.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows the effectiveness of swim jigs for both largemouth and smallmouth bass in extremely clear water
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | Swim Jiggin' It
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeff Klozinski spend the day tracking down postspawn smallmouth.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Finding Transitional Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: James Lindner and Jake Wallace spend the day on Lake Vermilion catching smallmouth bass in the shallows on classic tubes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling Edge | Shallow Water Smallmouth
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this exciting episode of FishON!, we hit the legendary Bay of Quinte with none other than Dicki (Richard Sommerville), the ice fishing legend himself. With years of experience and a knack for finding trophy walleye, Dicki helps us navigate the ever-changing ice conditions and put our gear to the test. From early morning setups to heart-pounding battles with giant Quinte gold, this episode is packed with action, expert tips, and stunning winter scenery. Don't miss the ultimate ice fishing adventure!
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Image.alt: FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte
FishON | Ice Fishing Giants on Bay of Quinte

Video.summary: Join us on an exhilarating journey deep into the heart of Northern Ontario as we tackle mid-summer walleye fishing like never before! Guided by the rising sun, we gear up with our Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake for a day filled with fishing action and good times. Joining the adventure is Mercury Canada Marketing Manager Cameron Racine, adding expertise and excitement to this unforgettable outing. Don't miss the fun, the fish, and the breathtaking scenery!
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Northern Adventures: Mid-Summer Walleye Quest with Cameron Racine from Mercury Canada
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw teaches an in-depth course on fishing crankbaits in and around weeds.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shea McIntee heads South to Costa Rica and meets up with a wonderful group of friends who are the Reconte Hot Sause owners. The Costa Rican coastline is a perfect playground for this group as they explore traveling on a 50-foot catamaran, surf and fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica Surf and Turf with Riconte Hot Sauce
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Lanier Spotted Bass
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Lanier Spotted Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the best Sportfishing in the world takes place in Costa Rica. Especially out of a village named Nosara. The Nosara area is far from commercial fishing lanes and off tourists' beaten paths and is a best kept secret fishing and surfing destination. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we fish for Tuna, Billfish, and Dorado.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica's Best Kept Fishing Secret, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Going camping and trout fishing in the Sierras is one of our favorite things to do. For the first time, Shea McIntee and the crew head down to South Lake Bishop. What makes this trip unique is that we get to fish with some good friends.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - An Unforgettable Trip, South Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Bass Fishing Legend, Denny Brauer accompanies Kim on Lake Amistad. The bass have been migrated shallow, however the influence of a passing cold front presents a challenge as the two seasoned anglers pitch the bushes with a Rage Bug.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hot summer Jigging rap walleye on Ivanhoe Lake with our local anglers and big bags of walleye.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: More of Lake Huron Walleye Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Watch Korean War vet Charlie Gitzinger as he recounts his life in the military.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Caddo Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman’s Pro Vs Joe Camera Crew Madness
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro Vs Joe - Camera Crew Madness
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: This week we hit the river for the last time before the ice starts to take over. We show you tht ebest way to fish the rivers with 3 ways and boy do we get them.
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways
Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways
Larry Smith Outdoors | Fishing Rivers Using 3 Ways

Video.summary: Larry delivers loads of tips and tricks on catching walleye.
Video.title: Walleye Slam 2022

Video.summary: Jim explains how to build one of the most effective baits for bass.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin fishes brackish water for bass amd stipers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A few years back, we rallied up with my buddy Chris Atkins who owns and operates Central America fishing. He told me, Shea, you have to do a Stoked On Fishing Charters Panama trip and fish at Coiba National Park. It's the largest island in Central America, next to the world-famous Hannibal Bank. Needless to say, we rallied up the troops and made our way down south; it's only six hours from LAX our first Adventure was incredible, and that's precisely why we're returning for our second time.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Stoked on Coiba National Park, Panama: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: On today's episode of AnglingBuzz TV, we're talking all about finding walleye and how to catch them! Our special guest is Jason Freed who's a fishing guide on Minnesota's famous Leech Lake.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin gambles with a long run in search of big pre-spawn bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank: Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing can be very high-tech, but on the other end of the spectrum, it can actually be very simple. Today we're going to show you some presentations and tactics to put fish in the boat....easily!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim talks fishing and social media with Foundation Outdoors media expert Jake Hutcheson.
Video.title: Episode 1
